raw_cv_text:
Jude Washington
jude.washington@gmail.com · (415) 287-3649 · https://github.com/judeiosdev
EDUCATION
University of California, Berkeley | B.S. in Computer Science May 2024
Relevant coursework: Mobile Development, Software Engineering, Human-Computer Interaction
GPA: 3.72, Dean's List 2023-2024
EXPERIENCE
TechFlow Systems | Junior iOS Developer June 2024 - Present
Developed and shipped 3 customer-facing features in SwiftUI, reducing user onboarding friction by 28% per
analytics data
Optimized app launch time from 3.2s to 1.8s through lazy loading and Core Data caching, improving ratings from
3.8 to 4.3 stars
Collaborated with UX team to resolve 12 crash logs and memory leaks, cutting app instability incidents by 45%
Momentum Design Studio | iOS Development Intern January 2024 - May 2024
Built reusable SwiftUI component library with 15+ UI elements, accelerating feature development across 2 internal
apps by 3 weeks
Integrated RESTful API endpoints and managed JSON decoding using Codable, enabling real-time sync for 5,000+
user dataset
Fixed and documented 8 UIKit legacy code issues during modernization sprint, improving code maintainability score
by 34%
PROJECTS
FitTrack Pro | SwiftUI, HealthKit, Core Data, Combine September 2023 - April 2024
Engineered full-stack iOS fitness tracking app with HealthKit integration, achieving 2,400+ downloads on TestFlight
Implemented local-first architecture with Core Data sync, enabling offline access for 100% of features
Open Source: PopupKitSwiftUI | Swift, SPM, GitHub Actions July 2023 - Present
Maintained open-source library for customizable popup dialogs, garnering 180+ GitHub stars and 8 pull request
contributions from community
Published to CocoaPods with 500+ weekly downloads, reducing adoption friction across iOS ecosystem
WeatherMind | UIKit, Weather API, URLSession, Realm November 2023 - December 2023
Developed weather forecasting app with 10-day predictions and location persistence, completing academic
capstone in 6 weeks
Achieved 94% code coverage with XCTest unit tests and UI automation testing across 3 device simulators
NutriLog (University Project) | SwiftUI, Firebase, AVFoundation February 2023 - May 2023
Built nutrition tracking app with barcode scanner using Vision framework, processing 50+ food items per session
Designed Firebase backend architecture supporting 25 concurrent users in group study testing
EXTRACURRICULAR
UC Berkeley iOS Developers Club | Vice President August 2023 - May 2024
Organized monthly hands-on workshops for 60+ members covering SwiftUI, networking, and App Store best
practices
Mentored 8 junior developers on iOS fundamentals and portfolio projects, resulting in 6 securing internships
Apple Developer Academy (Partner Program) | Participant June 2023 - August 2023
Completed intensive 8-week bootcamp focused on SwiftUI best practices, accessibility, and performance
optimization
Shipped prototype app with accessibility audit achieving WCAG AA compliance across all 15 screens
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Swift, Objective-C, SQL
Technologies – SwiftUI, UIKit, Combine, HealthKit, Core Data, Vision Framework, AVFoundation, MapKit, Firebase,
REST APIs
Tools – Xcode, Git, GitHub, TestFlight, CocoaPods, SPM, Figma, Jira
